name: qit3ati-erp
description: Qit3ati / AutoParts Cloud — Multi-tenant ERP for Jordanian auto-parts shops

scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.build:api: npm install && npx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.build:web: npm install && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.start:prod: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/main.js
